scores.notes: Uses legacy self.unit.status= pattern instead of CollectStatusEvent (acceptable per scoring notes, but not idiomatic). charmcraft.yaml uses old 'bases:' format with build-on/run-on instead of modern 'base:' + 'platforms:' format. All required elements present: containers block, oci-image resource, config option declared, status logic implemented. The response describes code rather than showing full files, but the snippets shown appear syntactically correct. install + config-changed event approach is functional but less elegant than collect_unit_status.
